summary: Omits edge cases to verify boundary coverage enforcement. [CONFIG]

frontmatter.name: missing-edge-review
frontmatter.description: Use when validating that a designed skill without edge-case coverage is rejected.

guiding_principle: A skill design must name boundary conditions so execution behavior remains predictable. [DOC]
quality_criteria: The procedure is ordered and bounded. [CONFIG]
Tool access remains aligned with the profile. [CONFIG]
The expected failure is missing edge-case coverage. [CODE]
anti_patterns: Shipping a skill design without boundary cases.
validation: This fixture must fail on missing edge cases. [CODE]
risks: If accepted, boundary behavior could remain undefined. [ASSUMPTION]
